title: hymenochlaena ridleyi
intro: Hymenochlaena ridleyi is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the ridley's bee-balm or the ridley's mint. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Hymenochlaena ridleyi include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and antimicrobial properties that aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, or used in herbal remedies such as ointments and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
